task.en: Open Dinoco Airlines at http://localhost:3011 (it is already open in Safari and you are logged in). Complete online check-in for your upcoming flight DN0991 from Scranton (AVP) to Philadelphia (PHL), confirmation DN-CKW001, departing today at 6:00 PM. Check in so your boarding pass is issued.
